name: Jeff Weaver, OurRevolution.com
subject: The next chapter in our political revolution
body:
DNC Results
#
Sisters and Brothers,
I am writing from the DNC meeting in Atlanta. Like many of you I am disappointed by the result of today's Chair's race. But we knew this would not be easy. Creating a government that works for middle income and working families is a tough fight that we have to continue to wage. I am confident it is a fight we can win. Keith Ellison would not have had the strong showing he did without our progressive movement.
While the media has been focused on the race for chair, we have been winning elections within state and local parties. This would not be possible without you.
Our fight for progress doesn't end here. It's people like you who power our movement. Just like our inspiration Bernie Sanders has done for his entire life, our focus will always be about putting people's interests before corporate interest. As we continue to build our grassroots movement, together we will support progressive champions who run for office and work to transform the political system. This will be key to ensuring the Democratic party does everything it can to end the rigged economy that only benefits a select few.
[**Your support is critical to keep building upon that momentum. Can you contribute $27 to Our Revolution to keep supporting our local efforts?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a08/43f17890/215a3467/62002276/3758847596/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nextchapter?refcode=em170225-full")
I'm sure this DNC election has stirred up similar feelings to the ones you felt during and after the primary. It did for me. While Tom Perez ran a good race, many who supported him used tactics that were uncalled for. But he also made promises about building a grassroots party. We are going to hold his feet to the fire. One of the first steps he could take is to reimpose the ban on lobbyist money that President Obama put in -- and which those at this meeting shamefuly refused to support. There's too much at stake to let the Democratic Party continue its old (and losing) ways. With Trump and his allies controlling Washington we have to take it upon ourselves to elect progressives even if elements of the Democratic Party are locked in complacency.
[**Will you contribute to Our Revolution to send a message to the establishment that we are not done fighting them for power over the future of the country?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a08/43f17890/215a3467/62002276/3758847596/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nextchapter?refcode=em170225-full")
There will be many more wins and losses in the years ahead. What is most important is to never forget why we started our political revolution and why it is so critical to continue it.
In Solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
President
Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a08/43f17890/215a3467/62002277/3758847596/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nextchapter?refcode=em170225-suba")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a08/43f17890/215a3467/62002274/3758847596/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a08/43f17890/215a3467/62002275/3758847596/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a08/43f17890/215a3467/62002272/3758847596/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Anne Holton
subject: Sign Tim's birthday card?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

Tim's birthday is today, and I'm working with his team to surprise him with a card signed by all of his supporters.

**[Will you add your name? You can even write him a personal message.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ZxkD1pht%2BVUIbLBCbxXMOZ9c1XZXCfRk)**

| [](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=orgebf0uF2A6jRRv%2FaSU159c1XZXCfRk)
---

I know it would mean a great deal to him if you signed his card.

Thanks for helping to make his 59th birthday a great one.

Anne
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=1lGosFu2B5MFw5iHXRWJwp9c1XZXCfRk)
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2BeF72XCqsIjzhp4R9EtuGp9c1XZXCfRk).
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: Georgia, New Jersey, and Virginia
body:
Help us meet our donation goal before the end-of-month deadline.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can to help us reach our 50,000 donation goal before the end-of-month deadline:
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5bc/4067b0a/2d66e3d51/7e7c712f/3519647458/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/February-Goal-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170226_lr_nd&source=em_20170226_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170226_lr_nd")****
Remember that break from campaigning we were all looking forward to after Election Day?

Well, so much for that. With Donald Trump in the White House, we're always going to be campaigning -- whether it's to fight back against his administration's disastrous policies or to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, all across the country.

**[Can we count on you to be in the trenches with us?](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5bc/4067b0a/2d66e3d51/7e7c712d/3519647458/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/February-Goal-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+Can+we+count+on+you+to+be+in+the+trenche&utm_campaign=em_20170226_lr_nd&source=em_20170226_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170226_lr_nd")**

Trump kicked off his campaign for 2020 last weekend (scary, I know). But we have other things to focus on.

There's a special election in Georgia next month that could be our first opportunity to turn a red House seat blue on Trump's watch. Later this year, we have statewide races in Virginia and New Jersey that we have to win. And before you know it, we're going to be running full steam ahead into 2018 with a real chance to take back the House. But we need your help to do it.

When our new Chair Tom Perez comes into the office tomorrow, I want to show him what we have to work with. Whether we reach our end-of-month goal of 50,000 donors by Tuesday is going to determine what kind of resources our party has to do big things this year. Can I count on you to pitch in?

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5bc/4067b0a/2d66e3d51/7e7c712b/3519647458/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-goal?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170226_lr_nd&source=em_20170226_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170226_lr_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5bc/4067b0a/2d66e3d51/7e7c7128/3519647458/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-goal?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170226_lr_nd&source=em_20170226_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170226_lr_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5bc/4067b0a/2d66e3d51/7e7c7129/3519647458/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-goal?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170226_lr_nd&source=em_20170226_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170226_lr_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5bc/4067b0a/2d66e3d51/7e7c7136/3519647458/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-goal?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170226_lr_nd&source=em_20170226_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170226_lr_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5bc/4067b0a/2d66e3d51/7e7c7137/3519647458/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/february-goal?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170226_lr_nd&source=em_20170226_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170226_lr_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5bc/4067b0a/2d66e3d51/7e7c7134/3519647458/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/February-Goal-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170226_lr_nd&source=em_20170226_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170226_lr_nd")
** Thanks for your help,

Lindsey

Lindsey Reynolds
Chief Operating Officer
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5bc/4067b0a/2d66e3d51/7e7c713f/3519647458/VEsHAg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170226_lr_nd&source=em_20170226_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170226_lr_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5bc/4067b0a/2d66e3d51/7e7c713c/3519647458/VEsHDQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170226_lr_nd&source=em_20170226_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170226_lr_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5bc/4067b0a/2d66e3d51/7e7c713d/3519647458/VEsHDA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=19+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170226_lr_nd&source=em_20170226_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170226_lr_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5bc/4067b0a/2d66e3d51/7e7c713a/3519647458/VEsEBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=20+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170226_lr_nd&source=em_20170226_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170226_lr_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: ALERT (via FlaDems.com)
subject: this is going to be hard to watch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
you never know what Trump's going to say... | [NEWS UPDATE: DONALD TRUMP TO ADDRESS JOINT SESSION OF CONGRESS ON FEB 28
MAKE SURE WE CAN GET THE TRUTH OUT AFTER TRUMP'S SPEECH.
CLICK HERE TO DONATE $5 AND FIGHT BACK](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-trump-address?refcode=em022617_1&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+NEWS+UPDATE+DONALD+TRUMP+TO+ADDRESS+JOIN&utm_campaign=em022616_1&source=em022616_1")
We're dreading Trump's first speech to a joint session of Congress.

We're worried about what right-wing lies he's going to spout, because you never know what Trump's going to say.

The one thing we do know is Trump is going to be spewing lie after lie. That is why Democrats have a chance to make what should be a bright moment for Trump into something GREAT -- our best fundraising campaign of the year!

**But, we can 't turn the tables on Trump and have our best fundraising campaign so far if we don't get 5,000 donations by our FEC deadline on Tuesday. We must hold Trump accountable. **[**That is why we need you to click here and donate $5 now!**](http://act.floridadems. name: =?UTF-8?Q?Ronna=20McDaniel?=
subject: It’s up to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The President wants another record-breaking month. |

Friend, January was a record-breaking month for us, and I know the President has been impressed with our fundraising numbers so far. That’s all thanks to the motivation and dedication of supporters like you, Friend. If we keep this up, there’s no doubt in my mind that we’ll be able to fight back against the media’s attacks and enact our America First agenda. So please, to show your support, contribute one of the amounts below before our crucial FEC-mandated February deadline. CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $35 CONTRIBUTE $25 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT As chairwoman, my chief responsibility is to ensure our party has every resource it needs to defend our President from the media’s nasty attacks. This month, we’ve seen just how far the Left is willing to go to obstruct our America First agenda... And one thing is certain -- they’re not going to stop. With only 3 days left until our crucial FEC-mandated deadline, we’re counting on our top grassroots supporters like you to help us keep up this ground-breaking pace. Are you willing to contribute $100, $50, $30, or $25 today? Thank you for your continued support Friend, Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel Republican National Committee
CONTRIBUTE $100

Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecebaBAPgBAH-XjCKjWfaFQSvDRMN6aaaaLBFkBMLGWKla?q=6@xAwAy5&a=hl0ephmo-3_kieep.Ysi&p=X&1=
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of the Republican National Committee's online community. If you have any questions, concerns, or thoughts on the Republican Party, just click here to send us a message! If you'd like more information on the GOP platform or to volunteer, visit gop.com. Getting emails from the RNC is one of the best ways to stay up-to-date on our fight to take back the White House, but if you really want to scale back, click here to receive less email or click here to unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the GOP on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. Thank you for all that you do to help elect a conservative president.

clean_body: The President wants another record-breaking month. | Friend, January was a record-breaking month for us, and I know the President has been impressed with our fundraising numbers so far. That’s all thanks to the motivation and dedication of supporters like you, Friend. If we keep this up, there’s no doubt in my mind that we’ll be able to fight back against the media’s attacks and enact our America First agenda. So please, to show your support, contribute one of the amounts below before our crucial FEC-mandated February deadline. CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $35 CONTRIBUTE $25 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT As chairwoman, my chief responsibility is to ensure our party has every resource it needs to defend our President from the media’s nasty attacks. This month, we’ve seen just how far the Left is willing to go to obstruct our America First agenda... And one thing is certain -- they’re not going to stop. With only 3 days left until our crucial FEC-mandated deadline, we’re counting on our top grassroots supporters like you to help us keep up this ground-breaking pace. Are you willing to contribute $100, $50, $30, or $25 today? Thank you for your continued support Friend, Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel Republican National Committee CONTRIBUTE $100 Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. =

name: Democrats.org
subject: We're close to 50,000 grassroots donations
body:

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5b0/4067b0a/2d62dbe96/7e7c5454/1398418820/VEsEAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170226_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170226_dnc2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5b0/4067b0a/2d62dbe96/7e7c5455/1398418820/VEsEAw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170226_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170226_dnc2_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5b0/4067b0a/2d62dbe96/7e7c5452/1398418820/VEsEAg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170226_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170226_dnc2_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c5b0/4067b0a/2d62dbe96/7e7c5453/1398418820/VEsEDQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170226_dnc2_nd&refcode=em_20170226_dnc2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: Trump Watch (via FlaDems.com)
subject: he's told HOW many lies?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
And it's only going to get worse..... | **Donald Trump 's streak of falsehoods now stands at 33 days - _The Washington Post_**
Since becoming president, Donald Trump hasn't gone a SINGLE DAY without saying something misleading or downright false.

And it's only going to get worse, friend. Tuesday, Trump gives his first joint address to Congress, and you know he'll be spewing lie after lie.

[**We need to be ready to fight back against Trump 's lies THE MOMENT he's done with his speech. That's why we need your help to reach 5,000 donations by our FEC deadline Tuesday. Help us fight back >>**](http://act.floridadems.
